decision_note: Owner approved no-write LLM worker chain for research opportunity only.

topic_snapshot.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Research Guide — Best Research Order, Peace Shield, and T10 Path
topic_snapshot.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-03: page opportunity and query-page signals
topic_snapshot.notes: research.html shows meaningful impressions but middling CTR, plus a rising research priority query. This suggests the page likely needs clearer positioning of order, scope, and progression value rather than new content.
topic_snapshot.player_value: Players get a more useful research path and faster understanding of what to prioritize first.
topic_snapshot.duplication_risk: Medium; must stay distinct from costs, hero training, and peace shield guidance.
topic_snapshot.next_step: Route to human review to test whether the page can better answer research priority intent within current structure.
evidence: GSC page signal: research.html had 12710 impressions, 597 clicks, 4.70% CTR, avg position 7.27.
Rising query: `last z research priority` gained 11 impressions in the last 7-day comparison window.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z research guide` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Research` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.
